rule CDB_pentestai_exploit {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for pentestai exploit"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-06-07"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-CDB-INGEST" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

executive_briefing.executive_summary: During the reporting period, the CYBERDUDEBIVASH Sentinel APEX platform processed 74 threat advisories. Of these, 0 are classified as CRITICAL risk and 20 as HIGH risk. 0 advisories involve vulnerabilities confirmed as actively exploited (CISA KEV). Primary threat actors include UNC-CDB-INGEST. The overall threat posture requires heightened vigilance with focus on patch management and detection rule deployment.
